name: Chocolate Truffles/Freezable
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Chocolate/coffee liqueur or flavor extract mixed with water
18 ounces Bittersweet chocolate; chopped, or good quality semi-sweet chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whipping cream in a small, heavy saucepan. Heat to a simmer.
2. Cook on low heat until the cream is reduced by half.
3. Add liqueur or flavor extract and water mixture, and chocolate. Cook and stir on low heat until chocolate is melted. Add shortening. Mix well.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture into a shallow pan or bowl. Cool to room temperature. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate overnight, or for at least 8 hours, to firm the mixture.
5. Scoop chilled chocolate with a teaspoon or melon baller. Roll into balls. Roll balls in decorations (if using). Refrigerate in an airtight container between sheets of waxed paper for up to one week.
Makes: 3 dozen truffles
Note: May be frozen up to 3 months.
